title: Erika Kirk finally reacts to Druski viral video, calls the growing online criticism nothing but noise
summary_full: Erika Kirk says she is ignoring online criticism and focusing on her personal life. Her comments came after Druski’s viral video and ongoing political reactions. While Candace Owens questioned her and Donald Trump suggested legal action, no lawsuit has been confirmed. Despite the noise, Kirk says it is “just noise” and not worth her time.
